items.situation: Student checking lab report requirements with TA
items.speaker: I'm not sure how long the lab report should be.

options.A: Did you check the rubric she handed out?
options.B: The lab smelled like vinegar all afternoon.
options.C: Reports are stapled in the top left corner.
options.D: Yes, the experiment took about two hours.

items.explanation: A 用反问推进对话，指向能解答长度问题的评分标准，是自然回应。B 谈实验室气味，完全偏题。C 谈装订细节，借用 report 联想但不回答长度。D 用 yes 回答了一个没被问的问题，属答错问题类型。

items.speaker: Did you hear I got into grad school?

options.A: School lunches were better when we were kids.
options.C: I heard the radio was broken again.
options.D: Grades come out at the end of the term.

items.explanation: B 直接、热情地回应好消息，是最恰当的回应。A 借用 school 这个词谈无关往事。C 玩弄 heard 一词，谈收音机，偏题。D 谈成绩公布时间，与录取消息无关。

items.speaker: Where can I check when the gym closes tonight?

options.A: The gym got new treadmills last month.
options.B: Yes, the pool is on the lower level.
options.C: Don't bother — I'm headed there now, come with me.
options.D: Tonight there's a basketball game on TV.

items.explanation: C 不直接回答在哪查，而是解决潜在需求——一起过去，属语境转移，是最佳回应。A 描述健身房新设备，借词偏题。B 答了位置而非所问的时间，且 yes 答非所问。D 借用 tonight 谈比赛，完全偏题。

items.situation: Classmates discussing a group project deadline
items.speaker: Why are we leaving the whole project until the weekend?

options.A: The weekend forecast says it might rain.
options.B: Projectors need a new bulb in that room.
options.C: Yes, weekends are usually pretty busy.
options.D: Let's not put all our eggs in one basket.

items.explanation: D 用习语表达不该把所有事压到一处，恰当回应了对拖延的担忧。A 借 weekend 谈天气，偏题。B 玩弄 project/projector 谐音，谈灯泡，偏题。C 用 yes 回应了未被问的问题，答错问题类型。

items.situation: Classmate asking to borrow lecture notes
items.speaker: I missed today's lecture and have no idea what happened.

options.A: No worries — I've got you covered.
options.B: The lecture hall seats almost three hundred.
options.C: Today is the first warm day all month.
options.D: Did you remember to bring an umbrella?

items.explanation: A 用习语表示别担心、我帮你（暗示可分享笔记），是温暖自然的回应。B 谈教室容量，借词偏题。C 借 today 谈天气，偏题。D 完全转向另一话题，答错问题。

items.situation: Student checking lost-and-found at front desk
items.speaker: How do I report a backpack I left in the library?

options.A: Backpacks come in a lot of bright colors now.
options.B: What did it look like, and which floor?
options.C: Yes, the library closes at midnight tonight.
options.D: I report to the lab supervisor every Friday.

items.explanation: B 用反问索取识别信息，自然推进失物登记流程，是最佳回应。A 谈背包颜色，借词偏题。C 答了闭馆时间而非报告流程，且 yes 答非所问。D 玩弄 report 的另一含义（汇报），偏题。

items.situation: Student asking about printing at computer lab
items.speaker: What do I need to print from a lab computer?

options.A: The computers were upgraded over the summer.
options.B: Yes, you can definitely use that machine.
options.C: Just your student ID to log in and pay.
options.D: Labs stay open until ten on weeknights.

items.explanation: C 直接回答所需之物——学生证，最贴切。A 谈电脑升级，借词偏题。B 用 yes 回答了未被问的是非问题，答错问题类型。D 谈实验室开放时间，与所问无关。

items.situation: Checking if the bank is open
items.speaker: Is the bank still open at this hour?

options.A: The river bank flooded after the storm.
options.B: Yes, banking is a competitive industry.
options.C: I opened a savings account last spring.
options.D: Why not just use the ATM out front?

items.explanation: D 用反问提出替代方案——用门口的 ATM，绕开是否营业的问题并解决需求，是最佳回应。A 玩弄 bank 的另一含义（河岸），偏题。B 用 yes 谈行业，答非所问。C 谈过去开户，与当下是否营业无关。
